title: The Escape from Alabasta Begins
description: On pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part focuses on vivi’s choice approaches. The Straw Hats make plans to depart while Vivi faces the decision of whether to remain a princess or continue sailing with her friends.
scene: This scene belongs to the Vivi’s Choice Approaches sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Luffy, Vivi, Nami, Usopp, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Karoo
dialogue.text: Let me make this clear to you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Crap! You've gotta be kiddin' me!

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta citizen
dialogue.text: does that mean stopping the explosion;

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Was impossible from the very beginning?

summary: The Straw Hats make plans to depart while Vivi faces the decision of whether to remain a princess or continue sailing with her friends.
